messages.content: Which family/group does the element Hydrogen belong to: alkali metals, alkaline earth metals, halogens, or noble gases?
alkali metals (group 1)
Which family/group does the element Helium belong to: alkali metals, alkaline earth metals, halogens, or noble gases?
noble gases (group 18)
Which family/group does the element Lithium belong to: alkali metals, alkaline earth metals, halogens, or noble gases?
alkali metals (group 1)
Which family/group does the element Beryllium belong to: alkali metals, alkaline earth metals, halogens, or noble gases?

Which family/group does the element Fluorine belong to: alkali metals, alkaline earth metals, halogens, or noble gases?
halogens (group 17)
